description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent front porch and a gabled roof. The structure is set on a rectangular lot with a manicured lawn, a paved walkway leading to the entrance, and a backyard area that includes a swimming pool surrounded by palm trees and landscaping. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the roof is composed of dark shingles. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is enclosed, offering privacy and a dedicated outdoor leisure space. The overall design blends modern and traditional bungalow elements, with clean lines and functional outdoor areas.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gabled roof, front porch, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and palm trees. The exterior is light-colored with large, asymmetrically placed windows and a mix of modern and traditional design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entrance steps, porch, and manicured front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, side windows, and the transition to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, palm trees, and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible side windows, backyard enclosure, and landscaping.
